result.stdout:
Usage: ddd [command]

ddd

Commands:
  init             Initializes the DDD project
  generate-docs    Generate SVG documentation from YAML files.
  about            
  list             List All DDD Artifacts
  add              Adds a DDD item

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message
  --version     Show version

result.stdout:
Usage: ddd add [command]

ddd

Commands:
  subdomain    Add a new subdomain and generate a base YAML file.
  context      Add a new bounded context to a subdomain.
  aggregate    Add a new aggregate to a bounded context of a subdomain.

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message

commands.payload:
Usage: ddd add [command]

ddd

Commands:
  subdomain    Add a new subdomain and generate a base YAML file.
  context      Add a new bounded context to a subdomain.
  aggregate    Add a new aggregate to a bounded context of a subdomain.

Options:
  -h, --help    Show help message

result.stdout:
Usage: ddd add aggregate [--subdomain <String>] [--context <String>] [--help] name

Add a new aggregate to a bounded context of a subdomain.

Arguments:
  0: name     (Required)

Options:
  -s, --subdomain <String>     (Required)
  -c, --context <String>       (Required)
  -h, --help                  Show help message
